response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced polyglot Staff Engineer with direct, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP). His background includes designing high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second) and driving technical strategy across various startups and established companies. While his resume lacks explicit Python experience, his deep expertise in TypeScript, distributed architectures, and agentic workflows makes him an exceptionally strong fit for this AI-native engineering role.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Extensive Staff-level and Founder experience demonstrating strong ownership, technical strategy, and agile practices.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Python experience, which is listed as a must-have technical skill.
Frequent job transitions (many roles lasting 1-2 years) may raise questions about long-term operational ownership.
Significant historical focus on niche languages (e.g., DLang) may require a slight adjustment to the core stack.
